title: SSS Invokes Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for Ralph loop skill/agent routing based on file patterns and task types.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when manifest was generated

patterns.description: File glob patterns mapped to agent/skill configuration

taskTypes.description: Task ID prefixes (e.g., 'UI-*') mapped to primary agents

additionalProperties.description: Primary agent for this task type (e.g., '@frontend-engineer')

acceptanceCriteriaTypes.description: Acceptance criteria types mapped to validation configuration

defaultSkills.description: Skills always loaded for all Ralph loop sessions

stackBasedSkills.description: Stack technology mapped to recommended skills

detected.description: Skills detected based on this project's stack

enforcedForTasks.description: Task patterns that require design system compliance (e.g., 'UI-*')

fallback.description: Fallback agent if primary is unavailable

validators.description: Validator hooks to run for files matching this pattern

skills.description: Skills to load for files matching this pattern

ACTypeConfig.description: Configuration for an acceptance criteria type

validator.description: Validator hook script (null if no automated validation)

agent.description: Agent responsible for this AC type (null if story assignee)

requiresBrowser.description: Whether this AC type requires browser automation

browserTool.description: Preferred browser tool (agent-browser is default for Ralph)

requiresHITL.description: Whether this AC type requires human-in-the-loop signoff
